intent.raw: invoke plan for Live Intake Plan V2
intent.objective: Author and validate a non-executed high-complexity implementation plan with one safe first SWU and explicit real/irreversible gates.
intent.operator_sentence: Plan the intake, database, safety, future opening, Bitcoin commitment, and ritual number without executing them.

technique_overlays.trigger: The route plans protected participant data, external archive/Bitcoin evidence, and an irreversible close across multiple owners.
technique_overlays.validation_expectation: Plan-only writes remain separate from runtime secrets/live state; later execution returns one-SWU receipts and requires its own authority.

subagent_strategy.explanation: The user requested Invoke Plan, current decisions are complete, and local sequential synthesis is sufficient; no delegated execution is authorized.

steps.name: Build bounded planning context
stop_conditions: block if an implementation obligation lacks a source or explicit resolution

steps.name: Check planning ambiguity and approval
stop_conditions: ask one question if an acceptance-critical choice is unresolved

steps.name: Select planning templates and target inventory evidence

capability_metadata.purpose: machine-index-first template and target evidence lookup

stop_conditions: block if mandatory work-pack/layering/execution templates are unavailable

steps.name: Validate planning route and authority boundaries
stop_conditions: block on schema error, false authority, missing receipt boundary, or unused technique

steps.name: Author split work-pack and implementation layering
stop_conditions: block if task details, SWU atomicity, layer waves, validation, or exact first-unit navigation are missing

steps.name: Validate atomicity, narrow first unit, and recomposition
stop_conditions: block on task-shaped SWU, missing recomposition, hidden acceptance gap, or broad first unit

steps.name: Offer one-SWU Task Session handoff
stop_conditions: do not execute without explicit Task Session authorization
do not infer authority for later SWUs

gates.condition: All 12 planning obligations are covered or explicitly resolved.
Layering, split work-pack, task details, waves, validation, and SWU contracts are complete.
All non-exempt SWUs have one behavior and independent acceptance; SWU-LIV2-001 is narrowest.
Plan or invented-data evidence cannot enable real intake, external close, or token effects.
A later Task Session explicitly names one SWU; only SWU-LIV2-001 is currently eligible.

boundaries.contract: Write planning and observability artifacts only; no app, API, database, deployment, secret, live data, archive, Bitcoin, or token mutation.
Handoff contains exact SWU, source anchors, write scope, validation, receipt shape, and requires new authorization.
Real phrases, credentials, key/share custody, external publication, and destructive cleanup require the layer-specific human gate.

authority.lifecycle: invoke authors plan; target development cycle owns implementation
authority.execution: task-session one SWU at a time; manual owners for protected actions
authority.validation: task-local validators, Distill, independent readiness auditor
authority.memory: inventory remains a non-authority lookup projection
authority.promotion: user plus named layer owners; production close requires separate authorization

state_namespaces.write_policy: This run may create only the named V2 plan and observer record.
One authorized SWU; invented data through L2 unless the real-intake gate passes.
Never stored in plan/repository receipts; protected execution only.
Disposable rehearsal or separately approved production close only.

promotion_splits.rule: Evidence becomes eligible for owner review only; no receipt self-promotes a capability.
No promotion path exists in this plan.

promotion_guardrails: Invoke does not execute the plan.
Only SWU-LIV2-001 may be offered next and still requires authorization.
No real intake, external publication, key destruction, or token action follows from plan validation.
